scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run dev" "pnpm --filter @workspace/buffetts-buffet run dev"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.build:prod: pnpm --filter @workspace/buffetts-buffet run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
